title: Traditional British Beef Stew
description: A hearty, comforting British beef stew made with tender chunks of beef and root vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef in batches, then set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté the onions and garlic until softened.
Add the carrots and potatoes, cook for 5 minutes.
Add the flour, stir to combine.
Gradually add the beef broth, whisking continuously.
Add the browned beef, red wine (if using), and thyme.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2-3 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh thyme.
